description: Agent file has no YAML frontmatter block; name field is absent
suggested_fix: Add YAML frontmatter with name: monorepo-architect

description: Agent file has no YAML frontmatter block; description field is absent
suggested_fix: Add description field explaining what the agent does and when to use it PROACTIVELY

description: Agent file has no YAML frontmatter block; model field is absent
suggested_fix: Add model: sonnet (or appropriate tier) to frontmatter

description: No tools field declared in frontmatter; agent inherits full tool surface
suggested_fix: Add tools: Read, Grep, Glob to restrict access for this analysis-only agent

description: No example interactions provided; triggering accuracy will suffer
suggested_fix: Add ## Example Interactions with at least two realistic user requests

description: No output format specification; callers cannot predict agent output structure
suggested_fix: Add ## Output section listing what the agent produces

description: No tools field declared; agent inherits full tool surface
suggested_fix: Add tools: Read, Grep, Glob, Write, Edit for this code-generating agent
